'''javudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinful|cabinful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinful|cabinful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævidhith|jævidhith]] || [[word:jævidhij|jævidhij]] || [[word:jævidhish|jævidhish]] || [[word:jævidhi|jævidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvudhuth|javuvudhuth]] || [[word:javuvudhuj|javuvudhuj]] || [[word:javuvudhush|javuvudhush]] || [[word:javuvudhu|javuvudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javudhuth|javudhuth]] || [[word:javudhuj|javudhuj]] || [[word:javudhush|javudhush]] || [[word:javudhu|javudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufdhuth|javufdhuth]] || [[word:javufdhuj|javufdhuj]] || [[word:javufdhush|javufdhush]] || [[word:javufdhuf|javufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javudhuthu|javudhuthu]] || [[word:javudhuju|javudhuju]] || [[word:javudhushu|javudhushu]] || [[word:javudhuku|javudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javudhuth|javudhuth]] || [[word:javudhuj|javudhuj]] || [[word:javudhush|javudhush]] || [[word:javudhu|javudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javudhuthul|javudhuthul]] || [[word:javudhujul|javudhujul]] || [[word:javudhushul|javudhushul]] || [[word:javudhukul|javudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javudhuthuthu|javudhuthuthu]] || [[word:javudhujuju|javudhujuju]] || [[word:javudhushushu|javudhushushu]] || [[word:javudhuku|javudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javudhuthun|javudhuthun]] || [[word:javudhujun|javudhujun]] || [[word:javudhushun|javudhushun]] || [[word:javudhukun|javudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javudhuthuoro|javudhuthuoro]] || [[word:javudhujuoro|javudhujuoro]] || [[word:javudhushuoro|javudhushuoro]] || [[word:javudhukuoro|javudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
